mapper.select: SELECT q.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id WHERE q.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY (q.view_count + q.answer_count * 2 + q.vote_count * 3) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT q.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id WHERE q.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY q.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT q.*, u.username as user_name, u.avatar FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id WHERE q.status = 'OPEN' AND (q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
